# Digital Invest Inc.

> Private multi-sector investment company building operating systems across digital health, biotechnology, agrotech, food production, and infrastructure. Information for qualified and accredited investors only — not a public offering.

Digital Invest Inc. is a private portfolio company developing 20+ active projects. The website is an informational showcase for invited investors and partners. No payment, subscription, or public fundraising is offered through the site.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Digital Invest, vision, portfolio highlights.
- [About](/about): Company background and operating model.
- [Why Digital Invest](/why-digital-invest): Investment thesis and differentiation.
- [For Investors](/for-investors): Information for qualified and accredited investors.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Process for engaging with the portfolio.
- [Portfolio Overview](/overview): Snapshot of all active projects.
- [Projects](/projects): Full list of portfolio projects.
- [Team](/team): Leadership and key contributors.
- [News](/news): Press, announcements, and updates.
- [Company Presentation](/company-presentation): Interactive deck hub.
- [Schedule](/schedule): Book a consultation.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Flagship Projects

- [BioMath Core](/projects/biomath-core): Digital health supercomputer architecture.
- [Adamas Materials](/adamas): Diamond and luxury materials vertical.
- [TerraAero](/projects/terraaero): Agrotech drone platform.
- [MyDay](/projects/myday): AI productivity assistant.

## Governance & Compliance

- [Compliance](/compliance): Regulatory framework and disclosures.
- [Risk Factors](/risk-factors): Investor risk disclosures.
- [Governance](/governance): Corporate governance.
- [ESG](/esg): Environmental, social, governance approach.
- [Security](/security): Information security posture.
